pageContext.name: Blue Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 Iron Studios statues line — Blue Deluxe! Based on original references from Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom, this polystone Jurassic Park statue is hand painted and limited edition.   Jurassic Park collectibles fans, don't miss your chance to add Blue to your Jurassic Park collection!
